title: stenoglottis fimbriata subsp. saxicola
intro: Stenoglottis fimbriata subsp. saxicola, commonly known as the mountain stenoglottis, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the mountain stenoglottis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically harvested for its roots and rhizomes, which can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
